description_long: This is a pair of aviator-style sunglasses featuring a thin, full-rim metal frame with a double bridge design. The lenses are large, teardrop-shaped, and darkly tinted, providing ample coverage for the eyes. The temples are straight and slender, extending back with a slight downward curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The nose pads are integrated into the frame, likely adjustable for comfort. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with no visible embellishments or decorative elements. The glasses exude a classic, timeless urban style suitable for both casual and formal settings.
description: Aviator-style sunglasses with a thin, full-rim frame and dark, teardrop-shaped lenses. Sleek, minimal design with a double bridge and straight temples.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin, straight temple and the profile of the teardrop-shaped lens.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large, dark lenses, double bridge, and symmetrical frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the temple and lens profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Angled top-front view emphasizing the curvature of the frame and the double bridge structure.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is thin, full-rim, and features a classic aviator geometry with large, teardrop-shaped lenses and a double bridge. The temples are straight and slender, curving slightly at the ends for ear support. The overall style is minimalistic and streamlined, with no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are dark gray to black with a uniform tint, providing high opacity and sun protection. There is no visible gradient, mirror effect, or special coloration.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a double-bar design, with a straight upper bar and a lower bar connecting the lenses. It is integrated into the frame and appears to provide both structural support and aesthetic appeal.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a slight downward curve at the ends. There are no visible patterns, engravings, or decorative elements.
